  "findings": [
    "Cold joint visible between concrete lifts",
    "Potential lack of consolidation and bond between successive concrete layers"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Notify the structural engineer of record to evaluate structural integrity",
    "Perform non-destructive testing such as ultrasonic pulse velocity or core drilling to assess joint depth and bond quality",
    "Prepare a remediation plan which may include epoxy injection or demolition and replacement"
  ],
  "rationale": "A visible cold joint between concrete lifts indicates that the lower lift began to set before the upper lift was placed, preventing proper consolidation and bonding. This violates ACI 301 and ACI 304 standards for continuous placement and consolidation, compromising the structural integrity and water-tightness of the concrete element.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 301 Specifications for Structural Concrete",
    "ACI 304R Guide for Measuring, Mixing, Transporting, and Placing Concrete"
  ]
}
